# Mabior Agau — Cybersecurity Expert

> Portfolio and blog of Mabior Agau, an offensive security specialist offering penetration testing, red team simulation, and security engineering services from South Sudan.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Profile, services, projects, testimonials, and contact for Mabior Agau.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on offensive security, penetration testing, and threat research.
